main.description: A room within a house. Rooms reference tilesets, items, and critters for a users inventory

width.description: Grid width of the room in tiles. All flat grid arrays (spawnTiles, blockingEdges, tileAttributes values) use this as their row stride.

name.description: Display name for the room (e.g. Kitchen, Bedroom).

tileset.description: AT URI of the at.cozy-corner.tileset record.

blockingEdges.description: Per-tile edge blocking as a flat array of width * height (row-major). Each value is a bitmask: bits 0-3 = physical blocking per direction (N=1, E=2, S=4, W=8), bits 4-7 = ephemeral blocking per direction (N=16, E=32, S=64, W=128). Physical blocks movement; ephemeral blocks light/sound/heat. A fully blocked tile has value 15 (physical) or 255 (both). 0 = no blocking.

background.description: Background rendered behind the tile grid. Can be a solid color, gradient, or image.

spawnTiles.description: Per-tile spawn mask as a flat array of width * height (row-major). 1 = valid spawn tile, 0 = not spawnable. Players entering this room from outside appear at a random valid tile. If omitted or empty, players spawn at (0, 0).

critters.description: Critters placed in the room. Each entry spawns an autonomous creature at the given position.

tileAttributes.description: Per-tile attribute scores (e.g. lighting, heat). Each entry defines one attribute with a flat width*height value array (row-major).

behaviors.description: Lua scripts that define how this room responds to events (e.g. cutscenes on enter, ambient effects).

tileAttribute.description: A per-tile attribute score array. Values use the same 0-200 scale as movementAttribute (100 = neutral).

values.description: Flat array of width * height values (row-major). Each value is 0-200 where 100 is neutral.

tilePosition.description: A tile position within a room

layerName.description: Display name for the layer (e.g. Floor, Walls, Canopy).

tile.description: The tile index in the tileset

x.description: The x position of the tile in the room

y.description: The y position of the tile in the room

transform.description: Packed tile transform. Bits 0-1: rotation (0=0°, 1=90°, 2=180°, 3=270°). Bit 2: horizontal mirror. Bit 3: vertical mirror.

renderLayer.description: The layer to render the tile on, 0 = background, 1 = foreground, 2 = overhead

roomItem.description: A an item placed in the room

item.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.item record.

variant.description: The variant of the item to use

x.description: The x position of the item in the room

y.description: The y position of the item in the room

transform.description: Optional 2D affine transform applied when compositing the item, stored as a fixed-point matrix (see at.cozy-corner.defs#transform).

state.description: State values for this placement, overriding variant and stateProperty defaults.

foreground.description: 1 if the item is painted on the front layer, 0 if it is painted behind

backgroundImage.description: A background image rendered behind the tile grid (e.g. sky, landscape for outdoor rooms).

backgroundColor.description: A solid color background rendered behind the tile grid.

backgroundGradient.description: A gradient background rendered behind the tile grid.

angle.description: Gradient angle in degrees. 0 = top to bottom, 90 = left to right, 180 = bottom to top.

stops.description: Gradient color stops. Must have at least 2.

gradientStop.description: A color stop in a gradient.

position.description: Position along the gradient as a percentage (0-100). If omitted, stops are evenly distributed.

exit.description: A doorway or passage connecting this room to another. The exit occupies a rectangular region of tiles. To traverse a room exit the player must walk in the given direction while standing on an exit tile, or click the exit tile a second time.

label.description: Display label for the exit (e.g. Upstairs, Kitchen).

target.description: Strong reference to the target at.cozy-corner.house.room. The CID pins the version of the room when this exit was last saved.

targetExit.description: Index into the target room's exits array identifying where the player should spawn. Only trusted when the target room's current CID matches the strong ref CID; otherwise falls back to reciprocal exit matching.

x.description: Tile x position of this exit in the room.

y.description: Tile y position of this exit in the room.

width.description: Width of the exit region in tiles. Defaults to 1.

height.description: Height of the exit region in tiles. Defaults to 1.

direction.description: A bitmask of the direction the player must walk to traverse the exit. N=1, E=2, S=4, W=8

roomCritter.description: A critter placed in the room. The area mask defines which tiles the critter can occupy (room.width * room.height, row-major, 1 = valid). The critter spawns at a random valid tile and roams within the area.

critter.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.critter record.

area.description: Flat boolean mask of length room.width * room.height (row-major). 1 = tile the critter can occupy, 0 = off-limits. The critter spawns randomly on a valid tile.

name.description: Override display name for this critter instance (e.g. Mr. Whiskers).

state.description: State values for this critter placement, overriding stateProperty defaults.
